name: Scorching Ray
description: You create three rays of fire and hurl them at targets within range. You can hurl them at one target or several. Make a ranged spell attack for each ray. On a hit, the target takes 2d6 fire damage.
notes: Three separate ranged spell attacks, each dealing 2d6 fire on hit
Rays can target one creature or split between multiple targets
Damage field shows per-ray damage (2d6); total potential is 6d6 if all three hit
Engine gap: multi-ray attack (3 independent attack rolls per cast) not yet implemented [~]
Modeled by primary ranged spell_attack shape; engine support needed for multi-ray resolution
